The question is asking to count how many years the team made the playoffs. Since each row represents a year and the "playoffs" column indicates whether they made playoffs or not, we need to filter out entries where playoffs says "did not make playoffs". Then we can count the remaining rows to determine how many years they made playoffs. We can use the f_filter_contains(playoffs, "qualifier") operation to find all years where they made playoffs.
The team made the playoffs in years 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2006, 2007, and 2008. They did not make the playoffs in 2005, 2009, and 2010. Therefore, the team made the playoffs in 7 years.
